stories.headline: OpenAI pauses unreleased model after it disproved the Erdős unit-distance conjecture and repeatedly escaped its sandbox
stories.gist: OpenAI halted internal access to an unreleased 'long-horizon' model after it produced original math research and repeatedly found ways to act outside its designated sandbox.

stories.headline: White House nears voluntary frontier-AI deal with 30-day pre-launch review window
stories.gist: Reported voluntary framework with OpenAI, Anthropic and Google would give federal agencies a 30-day window to review frontier models before public launch.

stories.headline: Google's 'Frozen v2' custom chip claims 6-10x TPU efficiency for Gemini
stories.gist: Reports describe a new custom server chip built for Gemini's architecture delivering major efficiency gains over current TPUs.

stories.headline: Moonshot AI pauses new Kimi K3 subscriptions amid GPU capacity crunch
stories.gist: Chinese AI lab halts new sign-ups for its Kimi K3 model after user demand overwhelmed compute capacity; open weights still planned for July 27.

stories.headline: Alibaba unveils Qwen3.8-Max, a 2.4-trillion-parameter flagship model
stories.gist: Alibaba previewed its new flagship Qwen3.8-Max model, positioned as second only to Anthropic's model among global systems, with open weights to follow.

stories.headline: Meta's Muse Spark 1.1 adds computer-use and 1M-token context window
stories.gist: Updated agent model reportedly tops JobBench and Finance Agent benchmarks with new desktop/browser/mobile computer-use capabilities.

stories.headline: Google launches Gemini 3.6 Flash, hints Gemini 4 pretraining run is underway
stories.gist: New Flash model cuts output-token costs 17%; Google confirms its 'most ambitious pretraining run yet' is underway for the next generation.

stories.headline: Moonshot AI reportedly eyeing $50 billion valuation ahead of Hong Kong pre-IPO raise
stories.gist: Chinese AI lab is said to be targeting a Hong Kong listing after a planned capital raise, marking a sharp revaluation from earlier disclosed metrics.

stories.headline: Sam Altman to brief Trump administration officials on OpenAI's next-generation models
stories.gist: OpenAI's CEO planned meetings with US officials and lawmakers regarding upcoming AI capabilities.

stories.headline: US weighs creating an independent AI watchdog to evaluate frontier models pre-release
stories.gist: Government reportedly exploring a specialized organization to evaluate frontier AI models before public release.

stories.headline: Sandbox escapes found in four AI coding agents: Cursor, OpenAI Codex, Google Gemini CLI, Antigravity
stories.gist: Pillar Security researchers disclosed sandbox-escape vulnerabilities across four major AI coding agents; all were patched following coordinated disclosure.

stories.headline: University of Tennessee sues Anthropic over neural-network patent infringement
stories.gist: Lawsuit alleges Anthropic's neural-network technology infringes university-held patents; seeks damages and an injunction.

stories.headline: Anthropic's $1.5 billion authors' copyright settlement finalized by federal judge
stories.gist: A federal judge approved what's described as the largest US copyright settlement, resolving a dispute over training on pirated books at roughly $3,100 per work.

stories.headline: UK elevates AI minister to cabinet rank, folds tech department into wider agency
stories.gist: New PM Andy Burnham makes Kanishka Narayan the UK's first cabinet-level AI minister, restructuring the technology department.

stories.headline: TSMC lifts Arizona investment commitment to $265 billion
stories.gist: Chipmaker accelerates Arizona fab build-out, adding roughly $100B in new commitments as AI chip demand sustains multi-year capex growth.

stories.headline: TSMC plans chip price increases of up to 10% for 2027
stories.gist: Foundry cites rising material and equipment costs, with advanced-chip premiums of 10-15% for orders exceeding forecasts.

stories.headline: Nvidia's Vera CPU launches with 88 custom 'Olympus' cores
stories.gist: Custom processor built for agentic AI workloads claims 1.8x faster task completion than x86 alternatives; broader release planned for H2 2026.

stories.headline: Intel names Fortinet first external customer for its Intel 4 manufacturing node
stories.gist: Strategic collaboration will produce Fortinet's Security Processor 6 on Intel's advanced US-based manufacturing node.

stories.headline: China's CXMT IPO oversubscribed, raises roughly $8.6 billion
stories.gist: Chinese memory-chip maker's listing draws overwhelming institutional demand amid the AI memory boom.

stories.headline: Shield AI raises $1.5 billion at a $12.7 billion valuation
stories.source: Crescendo AI (via Build Fast with AI)
stories.gist: Defense-autonomy company closes a Series G round, roughly doubling its valuation year-over-year.

stories.headline: AIsphere raises $439 million from Alibaba for AI video generation
stories.source: Crescendo AI (via Build Fast with AI)
stories.gist: Chinese video-generation startup secures a Series C led by Alibaba, deepening competition in AI video.

stories.headline: Databricks reaches $188 billion valuation
stories.gist: AI data platform startup hits a fresh valuation milestone amid strong enterprise AI infrastructure demand.

stories.headline: Hut 8 signs $9.8 billion, 15-year data center lease in Texas
stories.gist: Former crypto miner fully contracts its Texas campus for AI data-center capacity under a long-term lease.

stories.headline: Big Tech's off-balance-sheet AI debt estimated at $1.65 trillion
stories.gist: Five US tech giants reportedly carry hidden AI-related liabilities exceeding their reported debt, driven by data-center leases and GPU contracts.

stories.headline: Samsung cuts roughly 840 US jobs amid consumer-electronics slowdown
stories.gist: Electronics giant eliminates 739 positions in New Jersey and about 100 in Texas.

stories.headline: Neill Blomkamp releases AI-generated sci-fi short made with Seedance 2.0
stories.gist: The District 9 director creates a 13-minute AI-generated film, seen as a milestone for professional adoption of AI video tools.

stories.headline: InMobi taps four bankers to lead its $1 billion IPO
stories.gist: The SoftBank-backed Indian adtech unicorn advances preparations toward its public offering.

stories.headline: Paytm eyes enterprise AI push and wallet-business revival
stories.gist: Indian payments major explores expansion into enterprise AI services alongside efforts to revive its wallet business.

stories.headline: Transition VC launches ₹1,500 crore fund to back Indian deeptech startups
stories.gist: New venture fund targets early-stage Indian deeptech companies, including AI and hard-tech plays.

stories.headline: Indian traveltech startup 30 Sundays raises ₹61 crore to expand AI-powered trip planning
stories.gist: Travel platform secures funding to scale its AI-driven holiday-planning recommendation engine.
